en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid COA SME U-1 Manufacture of Section VIII Div 1 Pressure Vessels (Shop only) in the Canada COA Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Avetta PQF - Canada COA SME U-1 Manufacture of Section VIII Div 1 Pressure Vessels (Shop only)

The Certificate of Authorization (COA), issued by the Technical Standards and Safety Authority (TSSA) in Ontario, Canada, is a regulatory license required for organizations performing activities under the province’s Technical Standards and Safety Act, 2000 and O. Reg. 220/01: Boilers and Pressure Vessels. Companies which design, manufacture, assemble, repair, or alter pressure equipment (e.g., boilers, pressure vessels, fittings) are required to maintain this certificate. \n\nA company can obtain a digital copy of its Certificate(s) of Authorization (COA) directly through the Technical Standards and Safety Authority (TSSA) Client Portal.
Please upload your COA SME U-1 Manufacture of Section VIII Div 1 Pressure Vessels (Shop only).
Please enter the expiration date of your COA SME U-1 Manufacture of Section VIII Div 1 Pressure Vessels (Shop only).
